extraction.one_line_summary: ČERNÝ Josef soloed to victory from a 14-rider breakaway after attacking with 22.5km remaining, gaining 41 seconds maximum advantage over disorganized chasers.
tactical_patterns: ČERNÝ attacked multiple times from breakaway 50-22.5km out, systematically eliminating CLARKE, MOSCA, CAMPENAERTS before chasers organized pursuit.
Peloton abandoned stage 50km out despite SAGAN needing points—team calculus prioritized energy conservation over sprint classification battle.
GEOGHEGAN HART attempted late GC attack inside final kilometer when group cohesion weakest, testing KELDERMAN/HINDLEY attention despite flat finish.

rider_signals.ČERNÝ Josef: positive: Multiple accelerations from breakaway show superior endurance positioning, forcing 41-second gap before organized chase began
rider_signals.CAMPENAERTS Victor: positive: Only rider to launch counterattack inside 6km, showing tactical awareness when ČERNÝ's gap stabilized at 20 seconds
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: negative: Team abandoned sprint chase 50km out despite needing points for ciclamino—signals either resignation or prioritized future stages
rider_signals.KELDERMAN Wilco: neutral: Successfully neutralized GEOGHEGAN HART late attack on flat finish, but proximity (12s) suggests vulnerable positioning heading to mountains
rider_signals.GEOGHEGAN HART Tao: positive: Probing 15-second deficit with opportunistic late acceleration on flat terrain reveals aggressive tactical mindset before final mountain stage
